message:
bd-dvgl: E2E full interactive loop test + fix ext_workloads HostcallKind::Log

Add e2e_tui_full_interactive_loop test proving the complete interactive path:
TUI input → VCR provider stream → tool execution (read) → rendered output →
clean exit. Verifies tool name/output rendering, final response text, and
session JSONL tree integrity (header, user/assistant/tool_result entries,
parent-child chain). Rich per-step artifact logging.

Also fix ext_workloads.rs missing HostcallKind::Log match arm from concurrent
agent work. Stage other concurrent agent changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
